data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of running the lifecycle per participant (start, save-progress, submit, finalize). However, the evidence provided does not confirm that all lifecycle stages are implemented and functioning as required. The linked use case mentions the need for this lifecycle, but there is no concrete evidence demonstrating that each stage is covered, indicating a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: Lack of evidence for the implementation of the complete lifecycle (start, save-progress, submit, finalize) for participants.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
